title: Uncraftable Mace / No mace
description:
Save the heavy core for decoration. 
Makes the mace uncraftable.
body:
# Purpose:
The purpose of this datapack is to make the mace uncraftable without removing the heavy core.

**Will not delete existing maces.**

# Instructions
1. Put the datapack in the datapacks folder
2. Run /datapack enable "file/Uncraftable_Mace"
3. Run /reload
4. Verify that you cannot craft a mace in survival mode.

To disable the datapack, simply remove it from the datapacks folder and restart the world.
